WH.label: Without Hearing

LH.label: Limited Hearing

WS.label: Without Speech

LM.label: Limited Manipulation

LRS.label: Limited Reach and Strength
LRS.source_note: ACS 2023: ambulatory difficulty; ~5.8% of U.S. population

LLCLA.label: Limited Language, Cognitive, and Learning Abilities
LLCLA.source_note: ACS 2023/CDC combined cognitive and learning disability estimates: ~4.7% of U.S. population
